name: MS-DOS 6.22
summary: MS-DOS 6.22 on v86 — disk streamed + verified from a κ-part manifest.

description.p: MS-DOS 6.22 on the v86 JIT. Its disk is a chunked content-addressed part-DAG: only the small manifest is sealed; each part streams on demand and is re-derived against its κ before the guest sees it (Law L5).
